caption:
The faculty thought the annual Astrophysics Gala would be all boring speeches, but I knew better. 🌹✨ While everyone else was mingling on the ground floor, I claimed the rooftop observatory for a private moment. The wind was playful that evening, teasing at my tailored camel blazer as I scrambled up the metal ladder to help the students calibrate the old telescope. 🎓🔭

I'm wearing my favorite cream silk blouse tucked perfectly into my high-waisted skirt. It's structured enough to look professional for a lecture hall, but oh, the way it hugs my waist... 🤫 My blazer is draped stylishly over my shoulders, the fabric stretching just enough across my chest to hint at my full figure without giving it all away. No spillage, just a delicious promise of what's underneath. 💃🔥 The pencil skirt is my secret weapon; it swallows my curves and hides my backside completely, making my legs look endless in these stilettos. 👠✨

As I twisted to reach the focusing knob, the silk clung for a split second, and I could almost feel the eyes on me. A junior professor was standing by the door, watching me work. I caught his gaze, bit my lip, and winked. 😘 Did he notice how the blouse buttons strain just a little when I raise my arms? Did he see the confident sway of my hips as I turned back? 😏 The city lights of Paris twinkled below, but up here, with the cool breeze and the warmth of the stars above, the air felt charged with something... electric. ⚡💋

Who needs a textbook when you can teach with a glance? 📚🔥 The gala can wait; I have a new perspective to share. Who's joining me up here? 👇✨

#UniversityLife #TeacherVibes #RooftopRomance #ParisStyle #BlazerChic #CurveQueen #AcademiaBeauty #LectureLessons #HiddenGem #SexyScholar
